script_excerpt:
import bpy, bmesh, math
from mathutils import Vector, Matrix

def new_cube(name, size, loc, rot=(0,0,0)):
    m = bpy.data.meshes.new(name+"_m")
    o = bpy.data.objects.new(name, m)
    bpy.context.collection.objects.link(o)
    bm = bmesh.new()
    bmesh.ops.create_cube(bm, size=1.0)
    bmesh.ops.scale(bm, vec=size, verts=bm.verts)
    bm.to_mesh(m); bm.free()
    o.location = loc
    o.rotati

name: character.dragon

notes: over token budget (8614 > 8000)
script_excerpt:
import bpy
import math

def make_mat(name, color, rough=0.6, metal=0.0, alpha=1.0, emission=None, emission_str=0):
    m = bpy.data.materials.get(name)
    if m is None:
        m = bpy.data.materials.new(name)
    m.use_nodes = True
    bsdf = m.node_tree.nodes.get("Principled BSDF")
    bsdf.inputs["Base Color"].default_value = (*color, 1.0)
    bsdf.inputs["Roughness"].default_value = rough

import bpy
from mathutils import Vector

# Target empty at head position
bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=(0, 0, 1.65))
target = bpy.context.active_object
target.name = "LightTarget"
target.empty_display_size = 0.15

def make_area(name, location, size, energy, color):
    light_data = bpy.data.lights.new(name=name, type='AREA')
    light_data.shape = 'RECTANGLE'
    light_data

# Rock material

mat_rock.use_nodes = True

bsdf.inputs["Base Color"].default_value = (0.11, 0.09, 0.075, 1.0)
